name: Breast Invasive Carcinoma
notes: Umbrella — use PAM50 subtypes for subtype-aware inference

name: Luminal A
notes: ER+/PR+ HER2-; endocrine-first

name: Luminal B
notes: ER+ proliferative; endocrine + chemo

name: HER2-enriched
notes: ERBB2-amp; HER2-directed therapy

name: Basal-like
notes: TNBC proxy; chemo + sacituzumab

name: Normal-like
notes: rare; low-confidence stratum

name: Cervical Squamous / Adenocarcinoma
notes: HPV-driven

name: Cholangiocarcinoma
notes: Intrahepatic and extrahepatic cholangiocarcinoma; BTC is the pan-biliary source-scope aggregate.

name: Biliary Tract Cancer
notes: Source-scope aggregate for pan-biliary ICI estimates spanning cholangiocarcinoma and gallbladder cancer; not an expression cohort.

name: Colorectal Adenocarcinoma
notes: Computed colorectal union of COAD+READ (cancer-cohort-aggregates); rectum is curated as colorectal so COAD/READ share aPD1+TMB at every tier; MSI/MSS cross-cut via cancer-subtype-groupings.

name: MSI-H/dMMR Colorectal Adenocarcinoma
notes: Source-scope aggregate for biomarker-selected MSI-H/dMMR colorectal TMB and ICI estimates; not an expression cohort. COAD_MSI/READ_MSI remain anatomical expression subtypes.

name: Colon Adenocarcinoma
notes: CMS1-4 molecular subtypes + MSI-H axis

name: Diffuse Large B-cell Lymphoma
notes: ABC vs GCB subtypes

name: Esophageal Carcinoma
notes: Adenocarcinoma + squamous lumped — biologically distinct

name: Glioblastoma Multiforme
notes: IDH-wildtype per 2021 WHO; mes/classical/proneural subtypes

name: Head and Neck Squamous Cell Carcinoma
notes: HPV+ vs HPV- — two distinct diseases

name: HPV+ HNSC
notes: Better prognosis; p16+; E6/E7-driven

name: HPV- HNSC
notes: Smoking/alcohol; TP53-mutant

name: Renal Cell Carcinoma
notes: Renal-cell carcinoma umbrella pooling KIRC/KIRP/KICH expression-bearing renal histologies; non-classification rollup. Non-clear-cell RCC source-scope rows hang under this parent for clinical evidence.

name: Kidney Renal Clear Cell
notes: VHL-driven

name: Kidney Renal Papillary
notes: Type 1 (MET) + Type 2 lumped

name: Non-Clear Cell Renal Cell Carcinoma
notes: Source-scope aggregate for KEYNOTE-427 cohort B overall non-clear-cell RCC outcomes; mixture of papillary, chromophobe, and unclassified histologies; not an expression cohort or classification target.

name: Unclassified Non-Clear Cell Renal Cell Carcinoma
notes: KEYNOTE-427 cohort B unclassified non-clear-cell RCC subgroup; not an expression cohort.

name: Acute Myeloid Leukemia
notes: Umbrella — see APL / ELN subtypes
fusion_driver: RUNX1-RUNX1T1; CBFB-MYH11; KMT2A-MLLT3; KMT2A-MLLT10; KMT2A-ELL; KMT2A-MLLT1; DEK-NUP214; NUP98-NSD1; NUP98-KDM5A; RBM15-MKL1

name: Acute Promyelocytic Leukemia
notes: PML-RARA; ATRA + ATO chemo-free cure

name: AML ELN2017 Favorable
notes: NPM1+/FLT3- or CBF; chemo-sensitive

name: AML ELN2017 Intermediate
notes: Mixed; individualized therapy

name: AML ELN2017 Adverse
notes: TP53/complex karyo; transplant-first

name: Lower Grade Glioma
notes: IDH-mutant (per 2021 WHO); vorasidenib-eligible

name: Liver Hepatocellular Carcinoma
notes: HBV/HCV/NASH etiologies

name: Non-Small Cell Lung Cancer
notes: Source-scope aggregate for non-small-cell lung cancer trial cohorts that report mixed squamous and non-squamous NSCLC outcomes rather than histology-specific LUAD/LUSC estimates; not an expression cohort.

name: Lung Adenocarcinoma
notes: EGFR / KRAS / STK11-KEAP1 axes — therapy-gating
fusion_driver: EML4-ALK; CD74-ROS1; EZR-ROS1; SLC34A2-ROS1; KIF5B-RET; CCDC6-RET; CD74-NRG1; SLC3A2-NRG1

name: EGFR-mutant LUAD
notes: Osimertinib-first; often never-smoker

name: KRAS-mutant LUAD
notes: Sotorasib (G12C); smoker-associated

name: STK11/KEAP1 LUAD
notes: Cold-immune; IO-refractory axis

name: Mesothelioma
notes: Pleural + peritoneal; BAP1/NF2

name: Ovarian Serous Cystadenocarcinoma
notes: HGSOC-dominant; BRCA/HRD + PARP

name: Pancreatic Adenocarcinoma
notes: Adenocarcinoma only; panNET/acinar separate

name: Pheochromocytoma and Paraganglioma
notes: Extra-adrenal paragangliomas + pheos

name: Prostate Adenocarcinoma
notes: AR-driven; CRPC / NEPC disease states

name: Rectum Adenocarcinoma
notes: Similar to COAD; MSI-H matters

name: Sarcoma
notes: Pan-sarcoma grand union computed from all SARC_* histology atoms (cancer-cohort-aggregates); includes bone (OS/Ewing/chondro) and RMS; no frozen shard. Expression is the union but there is deliberately no single umbrella TMB (subtype TMB spans 0.6-2.2 mut/Mb) so SARC is excluded from the CTA-vs-TMB scatter.

name: Skin Cutaneous Melanoma
notes: BRAF/NRAS/KIT/triple-WT mutation classes

name: Stomach Adenocarcinoma
notes: EBV+ / MSI-H / CIN / GS molecular subtypes

name: Testicular Germ Cell Tumors
notes: Seminoma + non-seminoma; chemo-cure

name: Thyroid Carcinoma
notes: Papillary-dominant; follicular / anaplastic separate; medullary distinct

name: Thymic Epithelial Tumor
notes: Thymic epithelial tumor umbrella for thymoma and thymic carcinoma; expression reference currently computed from THYM because THYMCA lacks a dedicated matrix.

name: Uterine Corpus Endometrial Carcinoma
notes: Endometrioid + serous — different therapy

name: Uterine Carcinosarcoma
notes: Mixed epithelial + sarcomatoid

name: Uveal Melanoma
notes: GNAQ/GNA11; liver met tropism

name: Leiomyosarcoma
notes: Uterine + extrauterine; chemo + trabectedin

name: Dedifferentiated Liposarcoma
notes: MDM2-amp; Treehouse TCGA-SARC liposarcoma bucket split by GDC primary_diagnosis; brigimadlin / milademetan trials

name: Well-Differentiated Liposarcoma
notes: MDM2-amp; Treehouse TCGA-SARC liposarcoma bucket split by GDC primary_diagnosis; surgery-first

name: Myxoid Liposarcoma
notes: FUS-DDIT3; NY-ESO-1 TCR-T target. v5.6.0: Singer 2007 MSKCC GPL96 microarray (n=28 = 17 classic myxoid + 11 myxoid/round-cell which is the high-grade WHO variant of the same FUS::DDIT3-fusion entity). Biology validates: FABP4 2799, ADIPOQ 917, PPARG 424 (adipogenic), FUS+DDIT3 both ~165 (fusion partners both expressed), SOX9 122 (chondroid), STAT3 253 + JAK1 207 (FUS-DDIT3/JAK-STAT axis).

name: Synovial Sarcoma
notes: SS18-SSX; afami-cel (MAGE-A4 TCR-T) approved

name: Desmoplastic Small Round Cell Tumor
notes: EWSR1-WT1; WT1 TCR-T trials

name: Gastrointestinal Stromal Tumor
notes: KIT/PDGFRA; imatinib ladder + avapritinib

name: Malignant Peripheral Nerve Sheath Tumor
notes: NF1-associated; SMARCB1/EED/SUZ12 loss

name: Malignant Melanotic Nerve Sheath Tumor
notes: PRKAR1A loss / Carney-complex-associated; dual Schwann + melanocytic differentiation; WHO 2020 rename of melanotic schwannoma; usually spinal nerve roots; candidate RNA-seq PRJNA1083972

name: Angiosarcoma
notes: Tumor IS endothelial — constrained deduct

name: Undifferentiated Pleomorphic Sarcoma
notes: Previously MFH; diagnosis of exclusion

name: Osteosarcoma
notes: Not in TCGA — TARGET OS; GD2/HER2 trials

name: Ewing Sarcoma
notes: EWSR1-FLI1/ERG; CD99+; VDC/IE
fusion_driver: EWSR1-FLI1; EWSR1-ERG; EWSR1-ETV1; EWSR1-ETV4; EWSR1-FEV; FUS-ERG

name: Chondrosarcoma
notes: Broad expression-backed chondrosarcoma umbrella; subtype children do not claim independent validation

name: Chordoma
notes: T (brachyury) defining; skull-base / sacral

name: Embryonal Rhabdomyosarcoma
notes: MYOD1/MYOG; better prognosis than ARMS

name: Alveolar Rhabdomyosarcoma
notes: PAX3-FOXO1 or PAX7-FOXO1; aggressive

name: Neuroblastoma
notes: MYCN amp vs non-amp — therapy-gating

name: Neuroblastoma MYCN-amplified
notes: High-risk; dinutuximab + chemo

name: Neuroblastoma MYCN-non-amplified
notes: Intermediate/low-risk; better prognosis

name: Wilms Tumor / Nephroblastoma
notes: WT1/CTNNB1/AMER1; favorable vs anaplastic

name: Rhabdoid Tumor
notes: SMARCB1 loss; malignant; CNS AT/RT subset

name: Atypical Teratoid/Rhabdoid Tumor
notes: SMARCB1 loss; CNS-only rhabdoid

name: Medulloblastoma
notes: SHH / WNT / Group 3 / Group 4 subgroups

name: Medulloblastoma WNT
notes: Excellent prognosis; CTNNB1

name: Medulloblastoma SHH
notes: PTCH1/SMO; vismodegib-eligible

name: Medulloblastoma Group 3
notes: MYC-amp; worst prognosis

name: Medulloblastoma Group 4
notes: Most common; MYCN/CDK6

name: Retinoblastoma
notes: RB1 loss; pediatric eye

name: Hepatoblastoma
notes: CTNNB1; pediatric liver

name: Chronic Lymphocytic Leukemia
notes: IGHV mutation status; BTK/BCL2 inhibitors

name: Mantle Cell Lymphoma
notes: CCND1-IgH; blastoid variant aggressive

name: Follicular Lymphoma
notes: BCL2-IgH; indolent; transforms to DLBCL

name: Hodgkin Lymphoma
notes: Reed-Sternberg cells; CD30+; brentuximab

name: Burkitt Lymphoma
notes: MYC-Ig translocation; endemic/sporadic/immunodef

name: Multiple Myeloma
notes: Plasma-cell malignancy; BCMA/FCRH5 bispecifics
fusion_driver: IGH-CCND1; IGH-NSD2; IGH-FGFR3; IGH-MAF; IGH-CCND3; IGH-MAFB

name: Myelodysplastic Syndrome
notes: Pre-leukemic; IPSS-R risk; luspatercept

name: Myeloproliferative Neoplasms
notes: PV / ET / MF; JAK2 V617F

name: Chronic Myeloid Leukemia
notes: BCR-ABL; imatinib-cure paradigm

name: B-cell Acute Lymphoblastic Leukemia
notes: BCR-ABL-like + other fusions; blinatumomab / tisa-cel
fusion_driver: BCR-ABL1; ETV6-RUNX1; TCF3-PBX1; KMT2A-AFF1; IGH-DUX4; P2RY8-CRLF2; IGH-CRLF2

name: T-cell Acute Lymphoblastic Leukemia
notes: NOTCH1; nelarabine

name: Cutaneous T-cell Lymphoma
notes: Mycosis fungoides / Sezary; mogamulizumab

name: Neuroendocrine Neoplasm
notes: Neuroendocrine neoplasm umbrella spanning well-differentiated NET, poorly differentiated NEC, and high-grade extrapulmonary NEN evidence scopes; non-classification rollup.

name: Neuroendocrine Tumor (well-differentiated)
notes: Well-differentiated neuroendocrine tumor umbrella pooling site-specific NET atoms via cancer-cohort-aggregates; non-classification rollup under NEN. Poorly differentiated NEC and pituitary PITNET are distinct entities.

name: Pancreatic Neuroendocrine Tumor
notes: PanNET — Alvarez 2018 (GSE118014, 33 samples log2-TPM); octreotide/lanreotide, 177Lu-DOTATATE, everolimus

name: Midgut / Small Bowel Carcinoid
notes: Serotonin-secreting; 177Lu-DOTATATE; reference cohort is GSE98894 liver metastases (not primary), tagged tumor_origin=metastasis

name: Rectal Neuroendocrine Tumor
notes: Most common GI-NET in some Asian cohorts; reference is GSE98894 liver mets (tumor_origin=metastasis)

name: Lung Typical/Atypical Carcinoid
notes: Low-grade lung NE; distinct from SCLC

name: Nonpancreatic Neuroendocrine Tumor
notes: Source-scope aggregate for DART/SWOG S1609 low/intermediate-grade nonpancreatic NET ICI estimates; not an expression cohort and not site-isolated.

name: Extrapulmonary High-Grade Neuroendocrine Neoplasm
notes: Source-scope aggregate for pembrolizumab in extrapulmonary high-grade/G3 NEN; explicitly excludes pulmonary LCNEC/SCLC and Merkel cell; not an expression cohort or classification target.

name: Neuroendocrine Carcinoma
notes: Poorly differentiated/high-grade neuroendocrine carcinoma umbrella pooling SCLC, Merkel carcinoma, and pulmonary LCNEC expression-bearing leaves; non-classification rollup under NEN.

name: Pulmonary High-grade Neuroendocrine Carcinoma
notes: Pulmonary high-grade neuroendocrine carcinoma tier for LCNEC; SCLC remains a sibling under NEC because it has its own cohort and molecular subtypes.

name: Large-Cell Neuroendocrine Carcinoma Lung
notes: Intermediate between carcinoid and SCLC

name: Small Cell Lung Cancer
notes: Rudin/George 2015; ASCL1/NEUROD1/POU2F3/YAP1 subtypes

name: SCLC ASCL1-dominant
notes: Classic neuroendocrine; DLL3 target

name: SCLC NEUROD1-dominant
notes: Neural; ASCL1-low

name: SCLC POU2F3-dominant
notes: Tuft-cell-like; non-NE

name: SCLC YAP1-dominant
notes: Inflamed; proposed IO-responsive

name: Merkel Cell Carcinoma
notes: MCPyV+ vs UV; avelumab-sensitive

name: NUT Carcinoma
notes: NUT-BRD3/4 fusion; midline aggressive; UNC/Tempus n=3 case series (only per-sample NUTM expression; public NUT data is cell-line/controlled-access)

name: Salivary Gland Carcinoma
notes: Source-scope aggregate for pan-salivary ICI estimates; histology-specific salivary types remain separate expression/biology codes.

name: Acinic Cell Carcinoma
notes: Salivary gland low-grade

name: Adenoid Cystic Carcinoma
notes: MYB-NFIB; salivary + lacrimal + breast

name: Medullary Thyroid Carcinoma
notes: Calcitonin; RET-driven; separate from TCGA THCA (follicular-cell). Pringle 2012 GPL6480 Agilent microarray TPM-proxy (n=52 hybridizations across 49 primary cases). CALCA p95 ~3400 TPM-proxy confirms cohort.

name: Nasopharyngeal Carcinoma
notes: EBV-driven; distinct from TCGA HNSC

name: Hairy Cell Leukemia
notes: BRAF V600E; vemurafenib effective

name: Plasmacytoma
notes: Solitary plasma-cell mass (solitary bone / extramedullary)

name: Epithelioid Sarcoma
notes: SMARCB1/INI1 loss; tazemetostat (EZH2 inhibitor) approved 2020

name: Dermatofibrosarcoma Protuberans
notes: COL1A1-PDGFB fusion; imatinib approved; surgery-first

name: Alveolar Soft Part Sarcoma
notes: ASPSCR1-TFE3; atezolizumab approved 2022; anti-angiogenic TKIs

name: Clear Cell Sarcoma
notes: EWSR1-ATF1 fusion; melanoma-like biology but not BRAF-driven

name: Infantile Fibrosarcoma
notes: ETV6-NTRK3; larotrectinib / entrectinib approved

name: Epithelioid Hemangioendothelioma
notes: WWTR1-CAMTA1 (majority) or YAP1-TFE3; indolent-to-aggressive

name: PEComa (Perivascular Epithelioid Cell Tumor)
notes: TSC1/TSC2 loss or TFE3 fusion; nab-sirolimus (FYARRO) approved 2021

name: Kaposi Sarcoma
notes: HHV8-driven endothelial; immune-reconstitution / chemo

name: Myxofibrosarcoma
notes: Previously MFH myxoid-type; elderly limbs; surgery + chemo

name: Solitary Fibrous Tumor
notes: NAB2-STAT6 fusion; previously hemangiopericytoma

name: Inflammatory Myofibroblastic Tumor
notes: ALK fusion in ~50% (crizotinib), also ROS1/NTRK/RET fusion subsets
fusion_driver: TPM3-ALK; TPM4-ALK; EML4-ALK; RANBP2-ALK; CARS1-ALK; ETV6-NTRK3; TFG-ROS1

name: Giant Cell Tumor of Bone
notes: H3F3A G34W mutation; denosumab approved for unresectable

name: Low-grade Endometrial Stromal Sarcoma
notes: JAZF1-SUZ12 or similar; hormone-responsive; aromatase inhibitors

name: High-grade Endometrial Stromal Sarcoma
notes: YWHAE-NUTM2 or BCOR rearrangement; aggressive; chemo

name: Low-grade Fibromyxoid Sarcoma
notes: FUS-CREB3L2 or FUS-CREB3L1; late recurrences

name: Extraskeletal Myxoid Chondrosarcoma
notes: EWSR1-NR4A3 (majority); distinct from skeletal chondrosarcoma

name: Pleomorphic Liposarcoma
notes: No pathognomonic fusion; aggressive; differs from WDLPS/DDLPS/myxoid

name: Myxoid Pleomorphic Liposarcoma
notes: Distinct malignant WHO adipocytic entity that is common in pediatric and AYA patients but is not age-restricted. It lacks DDIT3 rearrangement and MDM2 amplification and instead has a complex copy-number profile with recurrent RB1/13q14 loss. No verified open RNA expression cohort; the 12-case Creytens study used FISH, shallow whole-genome sequencing, and DNA methylation, not RNA.

name: Pleomorphic Rhabdomyosarcoma
notes: Adult; distinct from pediatric ERMS/ARMS; no fusion

name: Spindle Cell / Sclerosing Rhabdomyosarcoma
notes: MYOD1 (congenital) or VGLL2/NCOA2 (infantile); distinct from ERMS/ARMS

name: Liposarcoma (Unspecified / Aggregate)
notes: Treehouse v25.01 mixed LPS source bucket (n=92); contributes data to the SARC_LPS union but is not a biological entity or classification target.

name: CIC-rearranged Sarcoma
notes: Ewing-like undifferentiated round cell sarcoma (Treehouse n=5 candidate; not yet built); CIC-DUX4 majority; ETV4/PEA3 + WT1 activation; more aggressive than Ewing

name: BCOR-rearranged Sarcoma
notes: Undifferentiated round cell sarcoma (Treehouse n=2 candidate; not yet built); BCOR-CCNB3 (Xp11) majority; BCOR-ITD in infantile

name: Soft Tissue Myoepithelial Carcinoma
notes: Myoepithelioma/myoepithelial carcinoma (Treehouse n=5 candidate; not yet built); EWSR1-POU5F1/PBX1 or FUS-POU5F1

name: SMARCA4-deficient Thoracic Sarcoma
notes: SMARCA4/BRG1 loss (Treehouse n=13 candidate; not yet built); undifferentiated thoracic; smoking-associated; not fusion-driven

name: Basal Cell Carcinoma
notes: Hedgehog-driven (PTCH1/SMO); most common human cancer; very high UV TMB. Public bulk RNA-seq GSE125285/GSE58377 not yet built into reference.

name: Cutaneous Squamous Cell Carcinoma
notes: UV-driven keratinocyte SCC; very high TMB; TP53/CDKN2A/NOTCH1 loss. GSE125285 (SCC arm) not yet built.

name: Vulvar Squamous Cell Carcinoma
notes: HPV-dependent and HPV-independent (TP53) pathways; SRA PRJNA994918 (n=9) not yet built.

name: Penile Squamous Cell Carcinoma
notes: HPV-variable SCC; GSE57955 microarray (n=39) not yet built.

name: Vaginal Carcinoma
notes: Rare HPV-associated SCC; no dedicated public bulk RNA-seq cohort (proxy cervical/vulvar).

name: Urethral Carcinoma
notes: Heterogeneous urothelial/SCC/adeno; no public bulk RNA-seq cohort (proxy TCGA-BLCA).

name: Fallopian Tube Carcinoma
notes: HGSC of tubal origin; not separable from ovarian in public data (pooled in TCGA-OV).

name: Primary Peritoneal Carcinoma
notes: HGSC of peritoneal origin; pooled in TCGA-OV.

name: Anal Squamous Cell Carcinoma
notes: HPV-driven anal SCC; GSE253560 bulk RNA-seq (n=70) not yet built.

name: Gallbladder Carcinoma
notes: Distinct from intrahepatic CHOL; ERBB2/TP53; DDBJ SAMD00254734-781 (n=36) not yet built.

name: Ependymoma
notes: Molecular groups (ZFTA/RELA-fusion supratentorial; PF-A/PF-B); OpenPBTA/CBTN + GSE64415 not yet built.

name: Craniopharyngioma
notes: Adamantinomatous (CTNNB1) vs papillary (BRAF V600E); OpenPBTA/CBTN + GSE94349 not yet built.

name: Diffuse Midline Glioma H3 K27-altered
notes: H3 K27M (H3F3A/HIST1H3B); pediatric brainstem DMG; OpenPBTA/PNOC003 + GSE115397 not yet built.

name: Astroblastoma (MN1-altered)
notes: MN1::BEND2 fusion-defined high-grade neuroepithelial tumor (WHO CNS5; early-ependymal/astroblastoma-like); cerebral; young/female-predominant; no public expression cohort

name: Meningioma
notes: Anchors the MENINGIOMA family panel (SSTR2A+ ~95%/EMA+); NF2 / SMARCE1 / KLF4-TRAF7 molecular subtypes; not yet built.

name: Choroid Plexus Tumor
notes: Anchors the CHOROID_PLEXUS family panel (TTR+/KCNJ13+/AQP1+ epithelium); papilloma vs carcinoma; not yet built.

name: Pituitary Neuroendocrine Tumor
notes: PIT1/TPIT/SF1 transcription-factor lineages; hormone-secreting; GSE147786 not yet built.

name: Anaplastic Large Cell Lymphoma
notes: CD30+ T-cell lymphoma; ALK+ (NPM1-ALK, younger) vs ALK- subtypes; brentuximab vedotin (anti-CD30); ALK inhibitors for ALK+

name: MSI-H Colon Adenocarcinoma
notes: MSI-H/dMMR; immune-hot; aPD1-responsive (~45% ORR); MSIsensor>=10

name: MSS Colon Adenocarcinoma
notes: Microsatellite-stable; immune-cold; aPD1-refractory (~0% ORR)

name: MSI-H Rectum Adenocarcinoma
notes: MSI-H/dMMR rectal; small subset

name: MSS Rectum Adenocarcinoma
notes: Microsatellite-stable rectal; immune-cold

name: MSI-H Stomach Adenocarcinoma
notes: TCGA gastric MSI subtype; MMR-deficient/MSI-H; expression reference from TCGA-STAD Treehouse PolyA samples split by cBioPortal molecular subtype.

name: EBV-positive Stomach Adenocarcinoma
notes: TCGA gastric EBV-positive subtype; immune-hot non-MSI confounder for binary MSI/MSS RNA classifiers; expression reference from TCGA-STAD Treehouse PolyA samples split by cBioPortal molecular subtype.

name: Chromosomal Instability Stomach Adenocarcinoma
notes: TCGA gastric chromosomal-instability subtype; pMMR/MSS-like negative for MMRd-vs-pMMR classifiers; expression reference from TCGA-STAD Treehouse PolyA samples split by cBioPortal molecular subtype.

name: Genomically Stable Stomach Adenocarcinoma
notes: TCGA gastric genomically-stable subtype; pMMR/MSS-like negative for MMRd-vs-pMMR classifiers; expression reference from TCGA-STAD Treehouse PolyA samples split by cBioPortal molecular subtype.

name: Rhabdomyosarcoma
notes: One-level tier pooling the RMS molecular atoms (ERMS/ARMS/PRMS/SSRMS) via cancer-cohort-aggregates; no single umbrella TMB (atoms span a range).

name: Liposarcoma
notes: One-level tier containing the liposarcoma entities (DDLPS/WDLPS/MYXLPS/PLEOLPS/MPLPS) and the LPS_UNSPEC source bucket; only members with expression matrices contribute values.

name: Endometrial Stromal Sarcoma
notes: One-level tier pooling low- and high-grade ESS (SARC_ESS_LG/HG).

name: Undifferentiated Small Round Cell Sarcomas
notes: Non-selectable WHO molecular grouping for Ewing; CIC-rearranged; BCOR-altered; and EWSR1-non-ETS round-cell sarcomas. DSRCT remains under tumours of uncertain differentiation.

name: Round Cell Sarcoma with EWSR1-non-ETS Fusions
notes: Distinct WHO round-cell entity; no verified open expression cohort. Do not collapse into Ewing sarcoma.

name: Periosteal Chondrosarcoma
notes: Named WHO chondrosarcoma entity without an independently verified expression cohort.

name: Clear Cell Chondrosarcoma
notes: Named WHO chondrosarcoma entity without an independently verified expression cohort.

name: Mesenchymal Chondrosarcoma
notes: HEY1::NCOA2 is characteristic of this entity and must not annotate broad chondrosarcoma.

name: Dedifferentiated Chondrosarcoma
notes: Named WHO chondrosarcoma entity without an independently verified expression cohort.

name: Low-grade Central Osteosarcoma
notes: Named WHO osteosarcoma entity; the broad pediatric/TARGET-like cohort does not independently validate this child.

name: Conventional Osteosarcoma
notes: Named WHO osteosarcoma entity; the broad pediatric/TARGET-like cohort does not independently validate this child.

name: Parosteal Osteosarcoma
notes: Named WHO osteosarcoma entity; the broad pediatric/TARGET-like cohort does not independently validate this child.

name: Periosteal Osteosarcoma
notes: Named WHO osteosarcoma entity; the broad pediatric/TARGET-like cohort does not independently validate this child.

name: High-grade Surface Osteosarcoma
notes: Named WHO osteosarcoma entity; the broad pediatric/TARGET-like cohort does not independently validate this child.

name: Secondary Osteosarcoma
notes: Named WHO osteosarcoma entity; prior disease or treatment context is not inferred from the broad cohort.

name: Extraskeletal Osteosarcoma
notes: Named WHO soft-tissue chondro-osseous entity; the broad bone cohort does not independently validate this child.

name: Conventional Chordoma
notes: Named WHO chordoma entity; the broad RiboD cohort does not independently validate this child.

name: Dedifferentiated Chordoma
notes: Named WHO chordoma entity; the broad RiboD cohort does not independently validate this child.

name: Poorly Differentiated Chordoma
notes: Distinct often SMARCB1-deficient WHO entity; no independently verified expression cohort.

name: Sclerosing Epithelioid Fibrosarcoma
notes: Distinct aggressive entity related to but not identical with low-grade fibromyxoid sarcoma; no verified own expression cohort.

name: NTRK-rearranged Spindle Cell Neoplasm
notes: WHO emerging entity spanning infantile to adult disease; no verified own expression cohort.

name: Intimal Sarcoma
notes: Malignant WHO entity of large vessels and heart; no verified own expression cohort.

name: Ectomesenchymoma
notes: Biphenotypic malignant WHO entity with rhabdomyoblastic and neural elements; no verified own cohort.

name: Inflammatory Leiomyosarcoma
notes: Distinct WHO smooth-muscle entity; no verified own expression cohort.

name: Adult Fibrosarcoma NOS
notes: Diagnosis-of-exclusion WHO fibroblastic malignancy; no verified own expression cohort.

name: Intracranial Mesenchymal Tumour
notes: Cross-book WHO CNS mesenchymal tumour entity; no verified own expression cohort.

name: Malignant Tenosynovial Giant Cell Tumour
notes: Rare malignant counterpart of tenosynovial giant cell tumour; no verified own cohort.

name: Malignant Granular Cell Tumour
notes: Rare malignant peripheral nerve sheath entity; no verified own cohort.

name: Malignant Perineurioma
notes: Rare malignant peripheral nerve sheath entity; no verified own cohort.

name: Malignant Glomus Tumour
notes: Malignant pericytic WHO entity; no verified own cohort.

name: Malignant Phosphaturic Mesenchymal Tumour
notes: Rare malignant counterpart; FN1-FGFR1 is associated with phosphaturic mesenchymal tumours but does not define malignant behavior; no verified own expression cohort.

name: Malignant Ossifying Fibromyxoid Tumour
notes: Rare malignant counterpart; no verified own expression cohort.

name: Myxoinflammatory Fibroblastic Sarcoma
notes: Rarely metastasizing WHO fibroblastic entity; no verified own cohort.

name: Superficial CD34-positive Fibroblastic Tumour
notes: Rarely metastasizing WHO fibroblastic entity; no verified own cohort.

name: Myofibroblastic Sarcoma
notes: Registry row covers the low-grade myofibroblastic sarcoma WHO entity; no verified own cohort.

name: Epithelioid Inflammatory Myofibroblastic Sarcoma
notes: Aggressive epithelioid ALK-rearranged subtype of inflammatory myofibroblastic tumour; no verified own cohort.

name: Fibrosarcoma of Bone
notes: Named WHO fibrogenic bone entity; no verified own expression cohort.

name: Adamantinoma of Long Bones
notes: Named WHO malignant bone entity; no verified own expression cohort.

name: Endometrial Carcinoma POLE-ultramutated
notes: POLE exonuclease-domain-mutant ultramutated subtype (~7.6%); >100 mut/Mb; excellent checkpoint response.

name: Endometrial Carcinoma MSI-H/MMRd
notes: MMR-deficient/MSI-H hypermutated subtype (~32%); pembrolizumab ORR ~50% (KEYNOTE-158).

name: Endometrial Carcinoma Copy-Number-Low (NSMP)
notes: Copy-number-low / no-specific-molecular-profile (p53-wild-type endometrioid; ~39%); MSS; low ICI response.

name: Endometrial Carcinoma Copy-Number-High (p53-abnormal)
notes: Copy-number-high / p53-abnormal serous-like (~21%); MSS, most immune-cold; lowest ICI response.

name: Primary Mediastinal B-cell Lymphoma
notes: Thymic-derived large B-cell; 9p24.1/PD-L1 amplification -> checkpoint-sensitive; pembrolizumab ORR ~41% (KEYNOTE-170); public array cohort GSE134511 (no bulk RNA-seq yet)

name: Anaplastic Thyroid Carcinoma
notes: Undifferentiated dedifferentiated thyroid; aggressive; higher TMB (~3.8) than differentiated; dual ipi+nivo ~30% and lenvatinib+pembrolizumab ~52% (ATLEP)

name: Thymic Carcinoma
notes: Thymic epithelial carcinoma (distinct from thymoma); higher TMB and worse prognosis; pembrolizumab ORR 22.5%; TCGA-THYM contains a thymic-carcinoma subset

name: HPV-negative Cervical Carcinoma
notes: Gastric-type / clear-cell HPV-independent cervical; TP53-driven; immune-excluded with worse ICI response; inherits CESC where no subtype-specific data; TCGA-CESC has an HPV-negative subset
